title: ‘All Old Anti-Modi Tweets Deleted’: AAP's Saurabh Bhardwaj's Cryptic Post Stirs Rumours Of Raghav Chadha Joining BJP
description: Explosive claims made by AAP leader Saurabh Bharadwaj in a cryptic post has stirred the rumours of Raghav Chadha's defection to Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). It is claimed that Chadha has removed all anti-BJP and anti-Modi tweets from his X timeline.
